name: Scaramouche / Kunikuzushi
description:

When he erased himself from Irminsul, he didn't consider that you'd forget him. And it hurt to see that the love of his life (if you could even call it that) had no idea who he was.

im going crazy and its still 4 am. this has been sitting in the basement unfinished so welcome back scaramouche i did not miss you ive been thinking about school bus graveyard

sorry if this is out of character for him cuz i dont really gaf

this might be bad in general and idc im just finishing stuff
